name: Signature Resources Ltd.
summary: Signature Resources Ltd. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily focuses on the exploration of precious metals. It owns a 100% interest in the Lingman Lake gold property that includes four free-hold patented claims, 14 mineral rights patented claims, and 1066 single-cell staked claims covering an area of approximately 20,124 hectares located in Ontario. Signature Resources Ltd. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
